title: The root schema
description: The root schema comprises the entire JSON document.

engagement_id.title: Engagement id
engagement_id.description: The engagement to which this widget belongs.

location.title: Widget location
location.description: The position in the engagement layout where this widget appears.

engagement_details_tab_id.title: Engagement details tab id
engagement_details_tab_id.description: Optional details tab ID for tab-specific widgets.
